Package jGameLib.ecs.ui2d

Class GameCanvas

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.GameCanvas
public final class GameCanvas extends Object
A canvas on which to draw stuff.

  • Method Details

    • repaint

      public void repaint(Consumer<JGraphics> drawFunction)
      Repaints the canvas, using the given function. Future calls to Component.repaint(), not necessarily triggered by the StateMachine, will also use the function.
      Parameters:
      drawFunction - The function to call to paint the canvas
